Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2180 "WARLOCKTHEAVENGER-0400-2180" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Warlock - The Avenger (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added some code at $0400 to intialise colour RAM to allow the intro to be displayed corrected.
